property_details.property_type: Beachfront / lagoon apartments — Dubai South Properties (govt-backed)

inventory.title: Current Availability (Live Price List)
inventory.subtitle: Available units at Beachfront Gates 2. 'Pool–Lagoon' view carries a premium over 'Community' view.
inventory.note: Highlighted rows = best-value entry per bedroom type (Unit 104 = entry 1-bed; Unit 112 = entry 2-bed; Unit 205 = entry 3-bed). Prices exclude 4% DLD + fees. Confirm live availability, floor/view and the 2-year post-handover plan with Dubai South Properties before reserving.

payment_plan.title: Payment Plan — 2-Year Post-Handover
payment_plan.note: Headline feature: a 2-YEAR POST-HANDOVER payment plan — roughly 40% of the price is spread over 24 months AFTER handover, so the unit can be leased and rental income applied toward the installments. This sharply reduces capital-at-risk versus a pay-on-handover plan. Percentages are indicative of a typical Dubai South structure — confirm the exact split, tenor, milestones, DLD/Oqood registration and fees with Dubai South Properties before reserving.

rent_snapshot.verdict: Pricing reality check: the AED 1.0M marketing headline is NOT in the live list — actual entry is ~AED 1.42M (1-bed, Unit 104) and ~AED 1.50M (2-bed Community, Unit 112); lagoon-view 2-beds run AED 1.77–2.13M. Yields here are on a ~AED 1.51M 2-bed Community unit. Dubai South 2-beds let at ~AED 85–110k with the beachfront premium. The 2-year post-handover plan is the real edge — lease on handover (~Q4 2026) and let rent fund the remaining ~40%.

investment_metrics.cap_rate_status: Gross 6.3% on a ~AED 1.51M 2-bed Community unit; lagoon units price higher, similar yield
investment_metrics.coc_status: 2-yr post-handover plan keeps capital-at-risk low pre-completion
investment_metrics.grm_status: Price-to-annual-rent on the entry 2-bed Community unit
investment_metrics.dscr_status: Staged in cash via the developer plan; mortgage optional post-handover
investment_metrics.one_pct_status: Below 1% rule — normal for Dubai capital-growth markets
investment_metrics.breakeven_status: Lease on handover; rent helps fund post-handover installments

strategies.risk: Dubai South near-term apartment oversupply; metro/rail future-dated

strategies.pros: Low capital-at-risk on the plan; assign before completion if market rises
strategies.risk: Resale liquidity thin during the supply wave; assignment fees apply

scenarios.trigger: Airport build-out accelerates, Expo City momentum, lagoon scarcity, supply absorbed
Steady infrastructure-led growth; flat-to-soft rents during 2026-28 supply wave
Dubai South apartment oversupply outpaces demand; rents discount; rates rise

recommendation.summary: Beachfront Gates 2 pairs a government-backed developer (Dubai South Properties) with a lagoon/beachfront concept on Dubai's strongest infrastructure-growth corridor — the $35B Al Maktoum Airport + Expo City. Note the live price list starts at ~AED 1.42M (1-bed) and ~AED 1.50M (2-bed Community) — above the AED 1.0M marketing headline — with lagoon-view 2-beds at AED 1.77–2.13M. Yields are moderate (~6.3% gross / ~4.1% net on the entry 2-bed), so the thesis is capital growth + the standout 2-YEAR POST-HANDOVER plan, which lets you hand over (~Q4 2026), lease, and fund the final ~40% from rent — minimal capital-at-risk. Underwrite on yield, hold 5+ years, and confirm the exact payment split.
recommendation.suggested_offer: Best value: 2-bed Community (Unit 112/212) ~AED 1.50–1.52M, or 1-bed (Unit 104) ~AED 1.42M; lagoon-view 2-beds from ~AED 1.77M
action_items: Confirm the EXACT payment-plan split (down %, construction %, post-handover % and tenor) in the SPA
Verify the service charge (AED/sqft) and reserve fund — beachfront amenities can run high
Prioritise lagoon-view (premium rent/resale) vs Community (best entry price) per the live list
Check DLD/Oqood registration and the developer's escrow + delivery track record
Underwrite rents conservatively for 2026-28 and plan a 5+ year hold

risk_factors.notes: Live entry (~AED 1.42M+) is above the AED 1.0M marketing line — set client expectations on real list prices
Elevated 2026-28 apartment deliveries near Expo/DWC may soften rents and slow resale
Metro/Etihad Rail links to DWC planned but not operational at handover — car-dependent for now
Lagoon/beach amenities can carry higher charges — verify exact figure before reserving
Resale/assignment may be slower during the supply wave; buy-and-hold is the base case
